name: Klaviyo
tagline: Marketing automation for ecommerce — email and SMS flows, segments, profiles.
security: Private API keys (pk_…) are server-only; public site keys (no prefix) are safe in client tracking but limited in scope.
Scope API keys to specific resources (events, profiles, lists) instead of using all-access keys.
Klaviyo rate limits aggressively — implement exponential backoff on 429 responses.
Use server-side events for source-of-truth user behavior; client tracking is for top-of-funnel only.

patterns.name: Event-driven flows
patterns.description: POST custom events to /events to trigger Klaviyo Flows for that profile.

patterns.name: List membership sync
patterns.description: Add/remove profiles from lists based on external system state.

patterns.name: Profile property sync
patterns.description: Update profile custom properties for segmentation.

triggers.name: Profile created
triggers.description: Fires when a new profile is created.

triggers.name: Profile subscribed to list
triggers.description: Fires when a profile opts in to a list.

triggers.name: Profile unsubscribed
triggers.description: Fires when a profile unsubscribes from a list.

triggers.name: Email opened
triggers.description: Fires when a profile opens a Klaviyo-sent email.

triggers.name: Email link clicked
triggers.description: Fires when a profile clicks a link in a Klaviyo email.

actions.name: Add profile to list
actions.description: Subscribe a profile to a Klaviyo list.

actions.name: Remove profile from list
actions.description: Unsubscribe a profile from a list.

actions.name: Track event
actions.description: POST a custom event to /events for a profile — triggers flows.

actions.name: Update profile properties
actions.description: Set custom properties on a profile.

actions.name: Trigger flow
actions.description: Manually trigger a flow for a profile (via the event that starts it).

auth.description: Private API key (pk_…) used as Authorization: Klaviyo-API-Key header.
